description: 1. Perfect gym wear2. Comfortable football bottomsThe soft-to-feel pair of Sports shorts will provide that extra comfort Comfort in a small size! Shorts are the most comfortable and easy to wear outfit ever designed. Worn by one and all, they are eye-catching and come in a range of colours, fits and sizes. Be it at home, an outing or even a day at the office, shorts as an attire lends a casual touch rather effortlessly. It's everyone's and everybody's way of saying “I'm so cool and comfy”. Slip into a shorts and feel the comfort take over. Along the way shorts have a knack of winning admirers with its looks as well. In short, you have something thats diminutive in size but spectacular in benefits. The new age dressing for everyone. Do not shortchange this for anything else.   Model's Statistics:1.
